queries: express bus route service increases will begin on June 30
BM2 BM5 SIM1C SIM4C SIM23 SIM24 summer 2024
local_registry_search.result: No previously staged or captured copy of the exact-date MTA press release was present. The staged April, July, and December board materials supplied month/season and retrospective status but not an exact realized day on one record.

queries: BM2 BM5 SIM1C SIM4C SIM23 SIM24 summer 2024
BM2 BM5 SIM1C SIM4C SIM23 SIM24 June 2024 schedule
Certain weekday trips were added express bus 2024
official_web_search.result: Located the official April 30 MTA press release stating that the six route increases would begin June 30, then captured it into the staged corpus.

official_source_capture.title: MTA Approves Commuter Rail Discounts for the Bronx and Queens and More Express Bus Service for Brooklyn and Staten Island

evidence.finding: The official press release is dated April 30, 2024.
MTA states that peak-period service increases on exactly BM2, BM5, SIM1C, SIM4C, SIM23, and SIM24 will begin June 30.

retrospective_delivery_evidence.finding: The later official staff summary says the weekday trips were added to the same six routes in summer 2024.

official_schedule_corroboration.finding: The 2024Jun schedule bundle first takes effect on Schedule Day 2024-06-30. On the first affected weekday, 2024-07-01, Express-service origin-terminal trip counts increase by exactly the route, direction, and trip quantities named in the board records. The 2024Sep bundle takes effect 2024-09-01 and those added rows are absent on the first post-change weekday.
official_schedule_corroboration.role: Independent official structured-feed corroboration; the addition occurrence remains bound to the staged MTA announcement and retrospective staff summary, while the same schedule capture separately anchors the paired Fall removal occurrence.

temporal_adjudication.basis: The dated official announcement supplies the exact June 30 start for the identical six-route service package, and the July 16 retrospective confirms that package was delivered in summer 2024. No contrary implementation date was found.
temporal_adjudication.status_resolution_mechanism: The exact-date event remains a source-time planned observation. A separate delivered has_timeline_event relation, evidenced by the July retrospective, resolves the occurrence as realized without rewriting the announcement as retrospective evidence.
temporal_adjudication.prior_month_event_disposition: The April 26 month-only planning event remains separate and prospective; it is a duplicate planning surface, not a second realized occurrence.

treatment_and_route_adjudication.basis: The later source describes one shared intervention—added weekday trips—and directly enumerates the six affected routes. Route-specific trip times remain descriptive details rather than six invented treatment identities.

project_identity_adjudication.basis: The April planning record and July delivered record describe the same six-route Summer package, not two projects. Identity consolidation preserves both source IDs, evidence refs, and planned/implemented merged field values; a guarded correction promotes only the resolved project status to implemented.

duration_caveat.finding: The July source recommends returning to prior schedules in September 2024, and the December source later says the increases were removed in fall 2024.
duration_caveat.disposition: The addition occurrence does not imply permanence. The separate reviewed occurrence occurrence:1dddfb078a97dd148a4e123d now represents the exact September 1 formal schedule boundary and delivered Fall removal without altering this event's source-time semantics.
